name: Golden Corn Sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cornmeal, flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt; mix well.
2. Add buttermilk and eggs, stirring just until dry ingredients are moistened.
3. Stir in shortening into the batter.
4. Preheat a cast iron corn stick pan by placing it in a 400 degree oven for 3 minutes or until very hot.
5. Spoon batter into the pans, filling them two-thirds full.
6. Bake at 400 degrees for 25 minutes or until lightly browned.
